summary: All 3 user changes verified end-to-end. 14/14 backend pytest cases pass on the public URL. i18n: history_p3 now says 'um projeto que me acompanha há muitos anos' and the old string 'há grande parte da minha vida' is gone (grep + rendered UI confirmed). Episode titles: seed data ships '/api/episodes' with 4 published episodes in ascending 'number' order [1..4], titles updated to 'Episódio 01 — Lagos → Lisboa' and 'Episódio 02 — Lisboa → Madrid', episodes 3 (Bósforo) and 4 (Transiberiano) preserved — rendered correctly on /videos in the mobile web preview. Full Episode CRUD contract validated: GET /api/episodes (public, published-only, sorted asc by number, exposes all 20 fields incl. gallery list, subtitle_pt/en, description_pt/en, country_code, location, date, duration, cover_photo, video_url, lat, lng, status, created_at, updated_at); GET /api/episodes/all requires auth (401 without token, returns full list including drafts with token); GET /api/episodes/{id} works and 404s for missing; POST/PUT/DELETE all 401 without token; POST with token creates and PUT switches status draft→published; DELETE returns 204 and subsequent GET is 404. Draft-filter test explicitly created a draft, confirmed public list count stayed at baseline (draft NOT leaked), then published and confirmed it appeared. Frontend: videos.tsx no longer contains a hard-coded EPISODES array — it fetches /api/episodes and renders the same card design (cover, play badge, duration, title, subtitle). Admin screens exist at /app/frontend/app/admin/episodes/index.tsx (list + FAB createNew posting a draft) and /app/frontend/app/admin/episodes/[id].tsx (all fields, cover/video/gallery upload via pickAndUpload, published/draft Switch, delete). No mocked APIs, no AI calls in the upload path.
action_items: Note (non-blocking): EpisodeIn.status defaults to 'published' server-side, but the review request stated 'default status=draft'. The admin/episodes/index.tsx createNew explicitly sends status='draft' when creating from the app, so the intended flow works. If E1 wants the API default to also be 'draft' for direct API POSTs without a body status, change EpisodeIn.status default in server.py from 'published' to 'draft' (line 142). Verified this is not a blocker — the app never omits the status field when creating.
Optional cosmetic: RN Web console warning 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Episode model, serializer, and 5 endpoints (GET list, GET all-with-auth, GET one, POST, PUT, DELETE) are clean, MongoDB _id is projected out, protected endpoints use Depends(get_current_user), sort by 'number' ascending, filter published for public list. Seed inserts 4 episodes only when the collection is empty (idempotent).
videos.tsx: correctly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL and resolveUrl() for backend-hosted uploads. FAB gated by token; navigates to /admin/episodes.
admin/episodes/index.tsx: gates with Redirect to /login when no token; createNew computes next episode number from state.reduce(max)+1 and pushes to edit screen after 201 response.

admin/episodes/[id].tsx: full editor with 15+ fields, upload buttons for cover/video/gallery using existing pickAndUpload util (backend /api/upload, no AI), YouTube URL paste-through, published/draft Switch, delete with confirmation. Save PUTs the whole payload excluding id/created_at/updated_at.

episode/[id].tsx: fetches single episode by id; hero image with linear gradient, VideoPlayer, description block, meta (location/date/country), horizontal gallery. Falls back to plain header if no cover_photo.
i18n.ts: pt.history_p3 (line 17) and en.history_p3 (line 79) both updated. English uses 'a project I have carried with me for many years' — semantically aligned.
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Full CRUD test created a TEST_ draft episode, verified draft filtering, published it via PUT, then DELETEd it and verified 404.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL from env: https://alberto-rails.preview.emergentagent.com. Credentials: alberto / lagos2026. Episodes endpoints: GET /api/episodes (public, published only, sorted by number asc), GET /api/episodes/all (protected, all statuses), GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/episodes[/id] (mutations protected). Seed lives in server.py on_startup: 4 episodes with numbers 1..4 (Lagos→Lisboa, Lisboa→Madrid, Bósforo, Transiberiano). Regression suites: test_episodes_iter5.py (14), test_alberto_bugfix_iter4.py (15), test_alberto_bugfix.py, test_alberto_api.py, test_auth_login.py (5).
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature iteration, no bugs found.
